title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description:
We're seeking an experienced Artificial Intelligence
Engineer to join our team. As an Artificial Intelligence
Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing,
and deploying AI and machine learning models to drive
business growth.



Responsibilities



· Design and develop AI and machine learning models using
Python, TensorFlow, and Keras

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI
models with existing systems

· Develop and implement natural language processing (NLP)
and computer vision models

· Optimize AI models for performance, scalability, and
reliability

· Stay up-to-date with emerging AI trends and technologies



Skills Needed



· 3+ years of experience in AI and machine learning
development

· Strong knowledge of AI frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch,
Keras)

· Experience with NLP and computer vision models

· Strong understanding of machine learning algorithms and
statistical modeling

· Experience with cloud-based AI platforms (AWS SageMaker,
Google Cloud AI Platform)

· Excellent problem-solving and communication skills



Qualifications



· Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial
Intelligence, or related field

· Certified AI Engineer or related certification (optional)

· Proven experience in designing and developing AI and
machine learning models

· Strong understanding of AI concepts and technologies



What We Offer



· Opportunity to work with a dynamic and growing
organization

· Collaborative and supportive work environment

· Professional development opportunities

· Flexible working hours and remote work options
responsibilities: Design and develop AI and machine learning models using Python, TensorFlow, and Keras
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI models with existing systems
Develop and implement natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision models
Optimize AI models for performance, scalability, and reliability
Stay up-to-date with emerging AI trends and technologies
use_cases: Business growth through AI model deployment
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on traditional ML/DL model development
using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Keras, with emphasis on NLP
and computer vision models. There's no mention of LLMs,
agents, RAG, or GenAI-specific tools, indicating this is a
traditional ML engineering role.
